description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On Saturday, March 7, I attended the unveiling ceremony for the new Moomin sculpture at Higashi-Hanno Station.

A year has passed since the first Moomin sculpture was installed at Hanno Station last March. Thanks to the warm welcome from our residents and many visitors, we have taken the first step toward becoming "Hanno, the town where you can meet Moomin."

Today, I am delighted to unveil the second Moomin sculpture in our city (Moominmamma) at Higashi-Hanno Station.

Higashi-Hanno Station, where the Seibu Line and JR Line intersect, is a crucial junction point for our city's rail network. Connecting our two gateways—Hanno Station and Higashi-Hanno Station—with Moomin creates a new axis for encouraging people to explore and move throughout town.

We will accelerate our "walkable town development" starting from our stations and push forward even more powerfully with revitalizing the entire downtown area.

I would like to express my heartfelt gratitude to all members of the "Hanno, the town where you can meet Moomin" Project Promotion Council and related parties for their tremendous efforts in advancing this project.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202603/13276.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: Unveiling ceremony for the new Moomin sculpture at Higashi-Hanno Station
